Upstream:         https://github.com/ratatui/ratatui
Upstream name:    ratatui
Upstream version: (placeholder, workspace pins 0.30)
Upstream commit:  placeholder — no upstream snapshot taken; local stub only.
Captured:         2026-04-14
Captured by:      Nathan Ribeiro <nribeiro@strm.com.br>
Purpose:          Reference reading only. Never consumed as a `path =` dependency.
                  See PROJECT.md §"Vendor policy" for the full rationale.

Relationship to workspace:
    This directory is NOT a dependency. The workspace consumes ratatui via
    crates.io pin 0.30 in [workspace.dependencies]. The current contents are a
    minimal local stub that was authored before this policy existed; a real
    upstream snapshot can be taken at any time when someone wants to grep
    real ratatui source while debugging API choices or comparing our
    implementation to upstream without a network round-trip.

How to refresh to a real upstream snapshot:
    1. git clone https://github.com/ratatui/ratatui /tmp/ratatui-upstream
    2. git -C /tmp/ratatui-upstream checkout v0.30.0
    3. rm -rf vendor/_reference/ratatui/*
    4. cp -r /tmp/ratatui-upstream/{src,Cargo.toml,README.md,CHANGELOG.md} vendor/_reference/ratatui/
    5. Update this STAMP.txt: Upstream commit = `git -C /tmp/ratatui-upstream rev-parse HEAD`.
